negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!

2. plays_for(ailton_silva,nautico) [input(axiom)]
7. ? [X0] : (plays_for(X0,nautico) & is_brazilian(X0)) [input(conjecture)]
8. ~? [X0] : (plays_for(X0,nautico) & is_brazilian(X0)) [negated conjecture 7]
12. ! [X0] : (~plays_for(X0,nautico) | ~is_brazilian(X0)) [ennf transformation 8]
13. is_brazilian(ailton_silva) [cnf transformation 1]
14. plays_for(ailton_silva,nautico) [cnf transformation 2]
21. ~plays_for(X0,nautico) | ~is_brazilian(X0) [cnf transformation 12]
22. ~is_brazilian(ailton_silva) [resolution 14,21]
23. $false [forward subsumption resolution 22,13]
% SZS output end Proof for neg_conclusion.tptp
